headline: Building Trust Since 1974
story:
Calvin Berry founded BT Construction over 50 years ago with a simple belief: do honest work, treat people right, and never cut corners. What started as a one-man operation working on homes across the Dallas–Fort Worth area has grown into a trusted remodeling company known for quality craftsmanship and integrity.

Calvin learned the trade from his father, carrying on a family tradition of building things that last. Over five decades, BT Construction has completed hundreds of kitchen remodels, bathroom transformations, and whole-home renovations — each one reflecting the same commitment to excellence that Calvin brought to his very first job.

Today, BT Construction continues to serve homeowners across Dallas, Plano, Carrollton, and the surrounding communities. Every project is personally overseen to ensure it meets the high standards our clients expect and deserve.

core_values.title: Integrity
core_values.description: We say what we mean and do what we say. Honest communication and transparent pricing are the foundation of every project.

core_values.title: Craftsmanship
core_values.description: 50 years of hands-on experience means we know the right way to do things. We take pride in work that stands the test of time.

core_values.title: Respect
core_values.description: Your home is your sanctuary. We treat every property with care, keep job sites clean, and respect your family's daily life.

core_values.title: Reliability
core_values.description: We show up on time, stick to the plan, and finish what we start. You can count on us from the first call to the final walkthrough.

milestones.title: Company Founded
milestones.description: Calvin Berry starts BT Construction, taking on his first kitchen remodel in the Dallas area.

milestones.title: 500th Project Completed
milestones.description: BT Construction reaches a major milestone, with hundreds of satisfied homeowners across North Texas.

milestones.title: Historic Restoration Specialty
milestones.description: The company expands its expertise to include historic home restoration, preserving the character of older North Texas homes.

milestones.title: 50 Years of Service
milestones.description: BT Construction celebrates half a century of quality craftsmanship and trusted service to the community.
